projects.title: Flagship Projects
projects.description:
As the VP of Technology, I am leading the development of the club's 6 technical divisions.

Humanoid Division
We are building the first fully-swiss made full-sized humanoid robot completely from scratch.

Aeronautics Division
We are developing our autonomous quadcopers to participate in international drone racing competitions.

Robot Learning Division
We are developing a state-of-the-art hardware and software stack to do research in robotic foundation models, dexterous manipulation and video-action models.

Robot Sorting Division
Applied vision-based robotic manupulation for waste management and logistics.

Robotics Security Division
Investigating security vulnerabilities in robotic systems from adversarial attacks against foundation models to hardware-level exploits.

Manufacturing Division
Providing the manufacturing backbone for all the club's projects.

projects.title: SQP-LPV-MPC: Real-Time Nonlinear MPC
projects.org: ETH Zürich — Intelligent Control Systems Group
projects.description: Developed a unified framework connecting Sequential Quadratic Programming (SQP) and LPV-MPC using a differential formulation and FTC-embedding technique. Applied this unified scheme to stochastic MPC problems, demonstrating real-world feasibility through GP-based racing at the limit of vehicle handling.

projects.title: GP-based Adaptive Trajectory Tracking
projects.description: Developed a GP-based adaptive controller that utilizes dynamic active learning and a decoupled LPV structure to refine uncertain vehicle dynamics online. The framework provides formal robust performance certificates via L2 gain analysis, validated through MuJoCo simulations and real-time implementation on the F1TENTH platform.

projects.title: Robust Imitation Learning via MPC
projects.description: Developed a robust imitation learning algorithm for nonlinear systems that leverages MPC as a control policy with guaranteed incremental input-to-state stability. The framework uses the Envelope Theorem for efficient closed-loop training and a counterexample-guided sampling approach to provide formal performance certificates. Validated in extensive simulation studies.

projects.title: Motion Tracker Beta
projects.description: Open-source GUI application for video-based motion tracking, developed for experimental mechanics research. Implements feature-point tracking and displacement field computation. Published in SoftwareX and available on PyPI.

projects.title: Small-Scale Autonomous Vehicle Platform
projects.description: Developed and deployed a comprehensive ROS2 control stack for miniature autonomous vehicles, spanning from perception and motion capture integration to real-time control pipelines. The project involved rigorous system identification and LPV model derivation, validated through hardware-in-the-loop testing on the F1TENTH platform.

projects.title: albernet.hu
projects.description: Full-stack web platform automating administrative workflows for residential landlords — lease management, document generation, and tenant communication. Built solo from scratch.
